description_long: This is a Dance Dance Revolution arcade game cabinet, featuring a large upright console with a prominent display screen and speakers, and a separate dance platform with illuminated arrow panels. The main console is constructed from metal and plastic, with a wide screen framed by a blue and white marquee displaying silhouettes of dancers and the game's logo. The dance platform has four colored arrow panels (blue and pink) arranged in a grid, each bordered by metallic trim, and is equipped with sturdy red handrails for player support. The control panel below the screen includes buttons and a start/select interface, while the lower section houses speakers and a coin slot. The overall design is robust and visually striking, intended for high-traffic public spaces. The cabinet is primarily gray and silver, with accents of black, blue, and red, and features a glossy, hard surface finish.
description: A Dance Dance Revolution arcade cabinet with a large screen, illuminated dance platform, and bold blue and pink arrow panels. The unit features sturdy handrails, a prominent marquee, and a robust, metallic build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full display screen, marquee artwork, control panel, speakers, and the dance platform with colored arrow panels and handrails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the console, the angled screen, and the separation between the main cabinet and the dance platform.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the cabinet and the edge of the dance platform, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the profile of the cabinet and dance platform, with handrails and arrow panels visible.
attribute_screen_type: LCD, flat, large rectangular with a visible bezel and integrated speakers on either side
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player control panel with several round buttons and a start/select interface, positioned below the screen and above the speakers, with a simple linear layout
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features blue and white colors, silhouettes of dancers, and the 'Dance Dance Revolution' logo in a dynamic, energetic style
